title: How to succeed with replication? Defining the key success factors of replication
subtitle: COCOREADO H2020 PROJECT - EDUCATIONAL MATERIALS
description: A training lesson from the COCOREADO H2020 project offering educators and coaches tools to analyze and facilitate the replication of innovative agricultural initiatives. It defines internal success factors, provides frameworks like SWOT and Six Capitals, and includes group exercises and replicability roadmaps to guide local adaptation.
